dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Monitor and control your Discord presence
dashboard.startServicePrompt: Start the service to begin tracking
dashboard.footer1: Your active app is automatically detected and matched via online APIs.
dashboard.footer2: Switch windows and your Discord presence updates in real time.
dashboard.waitingForDiscordHint: The service will start automatically when Discord is detected.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure your Discord RPC preferences
settings.defaultPresenceDesc: Used for apps without a custom config. Use {app_name} as a placeholder.
settings.defaultPresenceDesc2: This is what people see on Discord when you use an app without a custom config.
settings.detailsHint: Use {app_name} to auto-insert the app name
settings.apiKeyDesc: Get one free at steamgriddb.com — icons are auto-fetched for new games
settings.musicEnabledDesc: Show song info on Discord when music is playing

apps.title: Apps
apps.subtitle: Manage app configurations and overrides
apps.noAppsDetectedDesc: Start the service and switch between apps to see them here.
apps.noCustomOverridesDesc: Click "Edit" on a detected app to customize its Discord presence.

appConfigForm.buttonLinkDesc: Add clickable link buttons to your presence (max 2)

iconPicker.title: Choose Icon
iconPicker.noIcons: No icons found. Try a different search term.

setup.welcomeDesc: Let's set up your Discord RPC Manager
setup.autoStartDesc: Launch the app minimized when Windows starts
setup.autoStartEnabled: The app will launch when Windows starts
setup.autoStartDisabled: The app will not launch automatically
setup.serviceEnabled: The service will start automatically on launch
setup.serviceDisabled: You will need to start the service manually
setup.musicDesc: Show current song info on Discord
setup.musicEnabled: Music will be shown on Discord
setup.musicDisabled: Music will not be shown on Discord
setup.spotifyDesc: Get precise album covers via the Spotify API
setup.spotifyInvalid: Invalid credentials — check your Client ID and Secret
setup.spotifyOptional: Optional — Create a free app at developer.spotify.com to get precise album covers.
setup.steamgridDesc: Automatically fetch icons for games and applications
setup.steamgridOptional: Optional — Get a free key at steamgriddb.com for beautiful automatic icons.
